title: [FIRRTL] Constants not sunk for read probed values
code_blocks:
This is currently compiling (`firtool Foo.fir -disable-all-randomization`) to:


After https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/9657, this goes through some variations inside the pipeline. IMCP will split the constant. Canonicalize will CSE the constant back. Eventually LowerXMR will set a symbol on the node and that will lock in this emission pattern.

This would be better to _not_ do as some tools like to think of this as an "asynchronous load" reset. It's totally legal and fine, but tools are, sadly, dumb.

Acceptable emission is:


_Ideal emission is_:
